patchNotes: Tricks workflow overhaul: opening the Tricks tab now enables a temporary No Bail override before trick data and preview initialization. RoweMod automatically selects an editable BMX trick while keeping the Input Map open. Search or select a mapping, open Trick Editor to preview it, adjust animation timing, or swap human and bike animation sources. Animation changes auto-save, presets stay compact until opened, and No Bail returns to the player's saved setting one second after leaving the tab. Improved pane scrolling and searchable trick and animation-source dialogs.
